home.title: Kentchi — Augmented-Reality Oracle Decks & Visionary Art
home.metaDescription: Kent Osborn — Kentchi — weaves visionary paintings, augmented-reality (AR) oracle decks, and the illustrated memoir El Estimado into experiences that spark joy and wonder.
home.heroHeadline: Step Into the Magic – Where Art Comes Alive
home.heroSubheadline: Kentchi weaves visionary paintings, enchanting oracle decks, and augmented reality wonders into experiences that spark joy, creativity, and connection.
home.welcomeText: Kent Osborn — known to friends and fans as Kentchi — is more than an artist. He's a spark. Through his Shinan Oracle Deck and the vibrant Magnetic Magi, breathtaking paintings that pop with augmented reality, soulful music, and heartfelt circles, he invites you to co-create a more beautiful, playful, and inspired world. His work draws from deep wells of inspiration while staying rooted in joy, experimentation, and the pure delight of bringing visions into form.
home.decksText: Dive into beautifully illustrated oracle decks like the beloved Shinan Oracle and the Magnetic Magi. These aren't just cards — they're portals. Many feature augmented reality powered by Artivive that turns static art into living animations full of color, movement, and delight. These decks — including the forthcoming Through the Keyhole — and Kent's new book all come from his own imprint, Keyhole Mystic Publishing (KMP), and its doors are opening for other visionary makers too.
home.artText: Stunning paintings and creations that blend traditional visionary aesthetics with modern magic. Point your phone at the art using Artivive and watch it come alive! From gallery pieces to playful stickers, Kentchi's art radiates color, story, and pure creative energy.
home.eventsText: Gather in intimate circles, workshops, and retreats where Kentchi shares his craft and helps you develop your own oracle decks, mystic books, or artistic voice. Expect laughter, inspiration, deep connection, and lots of "aha!" moments.
home.musicText: Original songs, soundscapes, and musical journeys that accompany the visual magic. From heartfelt melodies born in moments of wonder to tracks that lift your spirit — Kentchi's music is another doorway into the playful mystic realm.
home.arText: One of the most joyful parts of Kentchi's work is the AR layer. Download Artivive (free on iOS and Android), point it at his oracle cards or paintings, and watch the art breathe, dance, and sparkle. It turns every piece into an interactive adventure — perfect for sharing the wonder with friends and family.
home.followIntro: Stay connected with Kentchi's latest paintings, AR experiments, stickers, and behind-the-scenes magic:
home.inkentationsText: Kentchi's personal creative playground: new paintings, AR surprises, stickers, and whatever spark he's chasing right now.
home.magneticMagiText: The official home of the Magnetic Magi oracle — striking visuals, AR magic, and the living energy of the cards.
home.shinanArtText: Deep dives into visionary and indigenous-inspired art, oracle decks, and creative projects.
home.shinanOraculoText: All things oracle decks — inspiration, readings, and the living energy of the cards.

decks.title: Augmented-Reality Oracle Decks | Kent Osborn
decks.metaDescription: Shinan Oracle, Magnetic Magi, and the forthcoming Through the Keyhole — hand-painted, AR-enhanced oracle decks from Kent's imprint, Keyhole Mystic Publishing.
decks.heading: Unlock Your Inner Oracle
decks.subheading: Beautiful decks, powerful guidance, and the joy of creation.
decks.intro: Kentchi's oracle decks are more than tools for insight — they're works of art that invite play, wonder, and personal transformation. The Shinan Oracle has touched thousands with its vibrant imagery and wise guidance, while the Magnetic Magi brings fresh magic to the table. Many of these decks come alive through Artivive — download the free app, point your phone at the cards, and watch them dance and reveal hidden layers of beauty and meaning.
decks.shinanText: A bilingual deck born from years spent with Shipibo teachers and mothers in the Peruvian Amazon. At its heart: Kené (Kuh-nuh) — luminous geometric designs that hold the spirits of healing plants, glimpsed by shamans in visionary states and translated by voice into icaros, the sacred sung medicine of the tradition. Each card is a doorway into that living language of pattern, plant, and song.
decks.magneticText: Rooted in the wisdom of Shipibo shamans of the Peruvian Amazon, the Magnetic Magi is a manifestation deck — your magnetic ally for calling in the life you long for. Each card helps dissolve limiting beliefs and quiet the thoughts that keep dreams at arm's length, so the visions you came here to live can take shape. Paired with Artivive, the magic literally moves.
decks.keyholeText: Sixteen years of hand-painted artworks (2010–2026), born during deep Shipibo dietas in the Peruvian Amazon and from Kent's visionary journeys through Colombia, Mexico, California, and beyond. The deck takes its name from the third eye — the inner aperture through which the visionary realms come into view, and which each card is a small key for. Built to open that door for anyone walking a path of spiritual growth, creative awakening, or inner exploration — no prior plant-medicine experience required. A guidebook, also by Kent, carries the meanings; the cards themselves carry a tidal wave of vivid artistic inspiration.
decks.whereText: The most reliable way to get a deck or El Estimado today is the most personal one: reach out to Kent directly. Keyhole Mystic Publishing ships copies to readers around the world, and is happy to make arrangements country by country. Broader distribution channels (such as Amazon, or fulfillment services like Amazon MCF) are on the horizon as the imprint matures — but for now, a personal note is how a deck travels from the studio to your hands.
decks.kmpIntro: Every oracle deck and book on this page comes through one door: Keyhole Mystic Publishing. It's the publishing home Kent has been building — an imprint born from years of helping fellow visionaries shape their own decks and mystic books, and from the desire to give those works a place that fits them.
decks.kmpCatalogShinan: Shinan Oracle — bilingual deck rooted in the Shipibo tradition.
decks.kmpCatalogKeyhole: Through the Keyhole — Kent's next oracle deck, coming soon.
decks.kmpCatalogElEstimado: El Estimado · Un viaje inesperado en México — Kent's new book: an illustrated memoir of an unexpected journey through Mexico, where every page is visionary art.
decks.kmpOutro: Keyhole Mystic Publishing isn't just Kent's home — it's becoming a home for others, too. If you've been carrying around an oracle deck, a mystic book, or a visionary project that's been whispering to be made, and you're not sure where it belongs, Kent wants to hear from you. The door is open.
decks.elEstimadoBody: An illustrated memoir woven through Mexico — its streets, its people, its mysteries. Visionary art on every page.
decks.elEstimadoTeaser:
Weary and frustrated by the emptiness of his home-office life in Los Angeles, Taylor impulsively escapes to the tropical paradise of Playa del Carmen, Mexico, hoping a change of scenery will transform his life. But before long, he realizes that no matter how far he travels, he cannot outrun himself. The same dissatisfaction, negativity, and restless dissatisfaction that haunted him back home continue to follow him beneath the palm trees and turquoise skies.

Taylor's downward spiral seems destined to continue without end—until one unexpected taxi ride alters the course of his life forever. Through a strange twist of fate, the taxi driver, Octavio, becomes an unlikely spiritual guide. Octavio introduces Taylor to his aunt Mariposa, a wise Mayan medicine woman whose warmth, insight, and ancient teachings awaken something long dormant within him.

Under her guidance, Taylor begins a profound journey of healing, self-discovery, and spiritual evolution. What starts as an escape slowly transforms into a meaningful journey toward meaning, purpose, and inner transformation—one that will forever change the direction of his life path.

art.title: Visionary Art with Augmented Reality | Kent Osborn
art.metaDescription: Kentchi's visionary paintings fuse sacred aesthetics with augmented reality (AR) — point your phone at the art and watch it breathe, dance, and sparkle.
art.heading: Art That Lives and Breathes
art.intro: Kentchi's paintings are explosions of color, pattern, and story. Rooted in visionary aesthetics and infused with personal magic, each piece carries its own spirit. And the cherry on top? Many of them are enhanced with Artivive. Download the free app, point your camera at a piece, and watch the painting awaken — shapes swirl, colors pulse, hidden elements emerge. It's pure joy in visual form.
art.beyondText: Stickers, prints, and small creations that let you carry a little piece of the magic with you.
art.processText: Every piece is hand-crafted — painted by Kent Osborn himself, without AI generation. The Artivive layer brings the art to life digitally, but the vision, the line, the color — all of it comes from his hand. From childhood drawings to a decades-long self-taught mastery, Kentchi's art flows from dreams, music, circles, and a lifelong love of making things that feel alive. No shortcuts, no filters — just a human spark translated into paint, pattern, and story.

experiences.title: ImaginArte Experiences | Kent Osborn
experiences.metaDescription: Live painting, murals, and AR-enhanced art events — gather with Kentchi for workshops, circles, and creative experiences full of color and connection.
experiences.heading: ImaginArte Experiences
experiences.intro: Some of Kent's best work doesn't happen in a studio — it happens in the open air, on a borrowed wall, in the middle of an unexpected conversation. ImaginArte Experiences are the moments where his brush meets your day, and something new takes shape between you.
experiences.livePaintingBody: Find Kent in the wild — a sunny park, a plaza, a vibrant corner — easel up and canvas open. Anyone passing through is invited to add a stroke, a swirl, a thought. Kent paints back. You paint forward. Soon two strangers (sometimes more!) are weaving a single piece together, while the conversation runs as warm as the colors. By the time someone walks away, they leave with stories, a few brushstrokes inside a larger world, and maybe a friend.
experiences.muralBody: Got a wall (or a ceiling, or anywhere unexpected) that's been waiting for a story? Kent transforms blank surfaces into living visionary compositions — bold, layered, and tuned to the place. The making itself is the second gift: stop by while he works, share a thought, ask a question, watch the piece dream itself into being. Each mural is unique to its location and the conversations that shaped it.
experiences.moreHint: Brushes and walls aren't the only doorways. Sound circles, retreats, and other gatherings unfold throughout the year — ask Kent what's brewing.
experiences.ctaHeading: Be part of the next adventure.
experiences.ctaText: Kent offers a variety of collaborative artistic events. Reach out to be there for the next one — or to dream up something new with him.

music.title: Music | Kent Osborn
music.metaDescription: Original songs and soundscapes by Kentchi — another doorway into the playful mystic realm that accompanies the visual magic.
music.heading: Music from the Same Spark
music.intro: Kentchi's music — under the name Inkentations — flows from the same creative well as his visual art and decks. Soulful songs, original compositions, and sound journeys that accompany the visual magic and lift the spirit. From early roots in piano and theater to songs that emerged during moments of deep wonder, the music carries a sense of play, healing, and pure expression.
music.connectionText: Many pieces were born alongside paintings or during circles. The music and visuals often dance together — another layer of the living art Kentchi loves to share.

about.title: About | Kent Osborn
about.metaDescription: Meet Kent Osborn — Kentchi — self-taught visionary artist, oracle-deck maker, and founder of Keyhole Mystic Publishing.
about.heading: Meet Kent Osborn – Artist, Teacher, Magic-Maker
about.body: Kent Osborn, known affectionately as Kentchi, has been creating since he could hold a pencil. From childhood drawings through years of musical exploration and visionary art, his path has always been guided by wonder and a desire to help others awaken their own creative spirit.
about.body2: Today he is known for his stunning oracle decks (including the Shinan Oracle and the Magnetic Magi), AR-enhanced paintings powered by Artivive, original music, and a joyful teaching style. Every painting, every card, every image in his work is made by hand — drawn, painted, and envisioned by Kent himself, not generated by AI. His art is the product of a lifelong practice and a deeply personal creative vision, and the Artivive layer is simply a way of giving that handmade magic a new dimension.
about.body3: More than anything, Kentchi sees himself as a catalyst — someone who loves sitting beside others as they birth their own mystic books, oracle decks, and artistic visions. He currently lives and creates in Mexico, where his work reaches stores and hearts around the world. Today his oracle decks, his paintings, and his new book El Estimado all live under his own imprint, Keyhole Mystic Publishing — an open door for other visionary makers too.
about.philosophy: "Creation should feel like play. When we stay curious and open, magic flows through us and into the world — often more beautifully than we could have planned."

contact.title: Contact | Kent Osborn
contact.metaDescription: Reach Kent Osborn directly to order an oracle deck or El Estimado, arrange an event, or connect about Keyhole Mystic Publishing.
contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Whether you're curious about the oracle decks, interested in a workshop or retreat, hoping to collaborate on a mystic book project, or simply want to say hello — Kentchi would love to hear from you.

meta.siteDescription: Augmented-reality (AR) oracle decks, visionary art, and the illustrated memoir El Estimado from Kent Osborn — published under his imprint, Keyhole Mystic Publishing.
